title: Moroccan Tagine Chicken with Fresh Tomato
description: A twist on traditional Italian dishes, this recipe combines the flavors of Morocco with the freshness of tomatoes. This hearty tagine is perfect for a cozy dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken thighs and cook until browned on both sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the pot and set aside.
Add the fragrant moroccan spice blend and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the rose petals and cook for an additional minute.
Add the sliced tomatoes and cook until they start to break down, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Return the chicken to the pot and season with salt and black pepper.
Cover the pot and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 30-40 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with additional rose petals if desired.
